chunks.text: So, let's understand what is Perceptron trick and how does it work?

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: Again, let's take the same example.

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: We have CGPA on the x-axis and IQ on the y-axis.

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: And this color, blue and green, is representing the placement of the children.

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: The placement of green children is done.

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: The placement of blue children is not done.

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: Now, we have to make a model which can take the CGPA and IQ of any new child

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: and be able to predict its placement or not.

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: If you are given this dataset and you are told that you have to make a model,

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: then how do you make it?

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: The first observation you take is that this data is linearly separable.

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: You can draw a line and classify this data into two classes.

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: I just have to find the equation of this line.

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: Now, always remember one thing while studying logistic regression.

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: The equation of this line is not in this form.

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: The equation here is in this form.

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: Ax plus By plus C is equal to 0.

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: You never use this equation in logistic regression.

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: You use it in linear regression.

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: In logistic regression, you use the general form.

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: In fact, you can write it better like this.

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: plus Bx2 where IQ is x2

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: Now, if this was in 3D, then this equation would have changed.

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: If there was an extra column, let's say there are 10 marks,

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: then you would have written it like this.

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: Ax1 plus Bx2 plus Cx3 plus D is equal to 0.

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: You can understand that in higher dimensions, you would have added terms like this.

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: So, anyways, what I have to do is

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: I can understand that this data is linearly separable.

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: I have to find a line that can cut this data.

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: That can properly classify both the labels.

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: And if I have to find the line,

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: it means I have to find the value of A, B and C.

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: So, my end objective is to find the value of A, B and C

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: so that you can perfectly classify the two classes in this data.

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: That's my objective at this point.

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: Now, here we will study how the perceptron trick works.

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: So, the perceptron trick is a very simple idea.

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: Let me explain it to you.

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: You will laugh at its simplicity.

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: How simply someone thought and came up with a solution.

chunks.title: Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: So, the solution is very simple.

Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: You start with random values of A, B and C.

Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course

Perceptron Trick | How to train a Perceptron | Perceptron Part 2 |  Deep Learning Full Course
chunks.text: So, now I have to reach from this line to this line.
